category_sources: Official repository README describes a platform-independent interface to Linux syscall filtering.
source_facts.description says libseccomp interfaces with Linux kernel syscall filtering.
docs_sources: Official README says the doc directory contains available documentation, mostly manpages.
Official repository README provides project overview, resources, and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/seccomp/libseccomp, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official README describes libseccomp as an interface over BPF-based syscall filters.
